scope: Battle Command enemy command-network cards show collapse-pursuit target candidates and readable reasons.
Collapse pursuit can be issued from a live battle when the target is a small group, flanking, breakthrough, overextended, disrupted, wavering, routing, regrouping, or low cohesion.
Issued collapse-pursuit duty survives into After Action as enemy-collapse-pursuit battle roles and then into next-battle tactical lessons.
codeChanges: EnemyCommandGroupReport now carries pursuitTarget, pursuitReason, and pursuitOpportunityScore.
Battle Command derives pursuit candidates from units in the command group plus related same-label/same-target-segment enemies.
Pursuit reasons now include command collapse, routing, regrouping, wavering, breakthrough, flanking, overextension, low cohesion, and small-group cleanup.
Collapse-pursuit queue/detail text uses the same reason helper as the visible card.

verification.mobileQa: skipped; mobile is outside the current target
flow: Ran battle at 3x until enemy command-network cards appeared.
Stopped battle and inspected collapse-pursuit candidates.
Observed pursuit candidates such as '追撃候補 銃兵 / 小集団 / 凝集100%' and '追撃候補 群集 / 側撃 / 凝集100%'.
Clicked an enabled '崩壊追撃' command.
Observed battle log '敵指揮網対応: 第4波指揮核へ崩壊追撃。2旅団が弱敵掃討へ移行。'
Observed unit result lines '任務 敵崩壊追撃 / 崩れた敵群を追撃、弱敵掃討を担当'.
Applied result and moved to next Deployment.
Selected 第4戦列歩兵大隊 and observed '戦術教訓 敵崩壊追撃1件 / 得意殺傷地帯 / 即応+1 / 統制+1'.
Pressed '教訓方針を適用' and observed '姿勢 阻止射撃 / 優先 最大集団 / 弾薬 集中射撃'.
verification.qaCampaignReset: attempted after verification; Playwright click timed out on the visible reset button, so final reset state was not confirmed
